caption: The video features a man seated at a table, engaged in what appears to be an interview or discussion. He is wearing a blue shirt with a logo on the left side and has a microphone attached to his ear, suggesting he is speaking into it. The background prominently displays the logos for "theCUBE" and "SiliconANGLE," indicating that this might be part of a tech-related event or conference. On the table in front of him, there are some books, one of which is titled "Spark Cookbook." The hashtag "#BigDataSV 2015" is visible in the bottom left corner, hinting that the event is focused on big data and took place in 2015. The man seems to be listening attentively, possibly responding to questions or engaging in a conversation about technology and data analytics.
